FullMind is a sleep-first meditation and relaxation app.

Primary topics:
- sleep support
- fall asleep fast
- racing thoughts
- overthinking
- bedtime overthinking
- stress relief
- anxiety relief
- focus support
- immersive meditation
- layered sound environments
- calming visuals
- vacation-like escape feeling

Public identity:
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fullmind.app/
- Threads: https://www.threads.com/@fullmind.app
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61567452940495
- Primary social handle: @fullmind.app

Current pricing:
- Monthly subscription: USD 4.99
- Annual subscription: USD 29.99

Important pages:
- /fullmind-site/index.html
- /fullmind-site/support/index.html
- /fullmind-site/why-fullmind/index.html
- https://pandazen-fullmindmeditation.github.io/fillmind-privacy/
- https://pandazen-fullmindmeditation.github.io/fullmind-tos/

Health advisory:
FullMind supports general relaxation, mindfulness, stress management, and sleep support only. It is not a medical app and does not diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent disease.
